title: centaurea annae
intro: Centaurea annae is a perennial plant species in the daisy family, known for its showy, fragrant flowers and potential medicinal properties. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Centaurea annae is traditionally used to support respiratory health and is sometimes used to treat coughs, bronchitis, and other respiratory issues, as well as to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Centaurea annae include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
